name: Hearty Ribs and Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 15 1/2 oz. great northern beans, rinsed and drained
2 15 1/2 oz. kidney beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ribs in an ungreased 13x9x2 inches baking dish; add water.
2. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 1-1/2 hours. Drain, reserving liquid; skim fat. Set ribs aside.
3. Add enough water to the reserved liquid to equal 1 cup; place in a saucepan. Add tomato sauce, soup mix, sugar, mustard, and hot pepper sauce. Simmer for 10 minutes; remove 1/2 cup.
4. To the remaining sauce, add beans, celery, and red peppers. Pour into the baking dish; add ribs. Pour reserved sauce over ribs.
5. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.
Yield: 6-8 servings.
